name: The Third Finger Offered to a King
overview: Ayaka, who works at the bridal department at a hotel, has a beauty that everyone recognizes, yet her personality is the worst. Everyone calls her a "wicked woman" after the way she wraps numerous men around her finger. The one who sets his eyes on her is the hotel's new executive Togo, who is the son of a very powerful person of the town. What are the orders that this King-like man requests of her!?

trailers.title: 主演･橋本環奈×山田涼介 交際ゼロ日で電撃結婚!? 火曜ドラマ『王様に捧ぐ薬指』4月18日スタート【過去回はパラビで配信中】
